twitter_thread: 60% of 2026's side hustles now earn $50k+/yr, a 25% increase from 2025
Top side hustles: print-on-demand ($1.5m/month on Redbubble), voiceover work ($40/hour on Upwork), and affiliate marketing ($10k/month on Amazon)
Upwork and Fiverr users see a 32% average earnings boost, with top earners making $100k+/yr
Tracking expenses with QuickBooks can save side hustlers $5k/yr in tax deductions
85% of side hustles that fail do so due to overdiversification: focus on one niche
Avoid the 45% tax bracket: set up an S-corp for your side hustle and save 15% on taxes
What's the most profitable side hustle you've started or invested in? #sidehustle #finance
pack.linkedin: In 2026, 60% of new side hustles have scaled to $50k+/yr, with top earners reaching $200k+. Print-on-demand, voiceover work, and affiliate marketing are driving this growth, with platforms like Upwork and Fiverr providing a 32% average earnings boost. To succeed, side hustlers must set clear financial goals, track expenses with tools like QuickBooks, and avoid overdiversification. What's your strategy for scaling a side hustle to six figures?
